auth.label: Personal access token
auth.description: Netlify personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or manage tokens from User settings under Applications > Personal access tokens.

actions.name: cancel_deploy
actions.description: Cancel one Netlify deploy by deploy ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Netlify deploy request.

site_id.description: The Netlify site ID for this deploy.

user_id.description: The Netlify user ID that created the deploy.

build_id.description: The Netlify build ID associated with the deploy.

state.description: The deploy state reported by Netlify.

name.description: The site name for this deploy.

url.description: The primary URL for this deploy.

ssl_url.description: The HTTPS URL for this deploy.

admin_url.description: The Netlify admin URL for this deploy.

screenshot_url.description: The screenshot URL for this deploy.

draft.description: Whether this deploy is a draft deploy.

branch.description: The Git branch used for this deploy.

commit_ref.description: The commit reference used for this deploy.

commit_url.description: The commit URL used for this deploy.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was last updated.

published_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was published.

context.description: The deploy context such as production or deploy-preview.

framework.description: The framework detected for this deploy.

error_message.description: The deploy error message when Netlify returns one.

actions.name: create_site_build
actions.description: Start a Netlify build for one site without uploading binary files.

siteId.description: The Netlify site ID or site name.

branch.description: The branch to build. Omit this for a production deploy.

clearCache.description: Whether Netlify should clear the build cache before building.

image.description: The Netlify build image tag to use.

templateId.description: The Netlify build template ID to use.

title.description: The title to attach to the build.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for starting a Netlify site build.

deploy_id.description: The deploy ID associated with the build.

sha.description: The commit SHA associated with the build.

error.description: The build error message when Netlify returns one.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the build was created.

actions.name: create_site_deploy_from_zip_url
actions.description: Create a Netlify site deploy by downloading a public zip file URL and uploading it to Netlify.

siteId.description: The Netlify site ID or site name.

zipUrl.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL of a zip file containing the site files. For local files, upload the file with oo file upload and pass its downloadUrl.

title.description: The title to attach to the deploy.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Netlify deploy from a zip file URL.

site_id.description: The Netlify site ID for this deploy.

user_id.description: The Netlify user ID that created the deploy.

build_id.description: The Netlify build ID associated with the deploy.

state.description: The deploy state reported by Netlify.

name.description: The site name for this deploy.

url.description: The primary URL for this deploy.

ssl_url.description: The HTTPS URL for this deploy.

admin_url.description: The Netlify admin URL for this deploy.

screenshot_url.description: The screenshot URL for this deploy.

draft.description: Whether this deploy is a draft deploy.

branch.description: The Git branch used for this deploy.

commit_ref.description: The commit reference used for this deploy.

commit_url.description: The commit URL used for this deploy.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was last updated.

published_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was published.

context.description: The deploy context such as production or deploy-preview.

framework.description: The framework detected for this deploy.

error_message.description: The deploy error message when Netlify returns one.

actions.name: delete_submission
actions.description: Delete one Netlify form submission by submission ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Netlify form submission.

success.description: Whether the Netlify request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The result of a successful Netlify request.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve one Netlify account membership, including billing and capability fields returned by Netlify.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Netlify account request.

type_name.description: The human-readable Netlify account type name.

billing_email.description: The billing email address for the account.

owner_ids.description: The Netlify user IDs that own the account.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the account was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the account was last updated.

actions.name: get_build
actions.description: Retrieve one Netlify build by build ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Netlify build.

deploy_id.description: The deploy ID associated with the build.

sha.description: The commit SHA associated with the build.

error.description: The build error message when Netlify returns one.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the build was created.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Retrieve the Netlify user associated with the connected credential.

anyOf.description: The Netlify user ID, or null when Netlify does not return one.
The Netlify user UID, or null when Netlify does not return one.
The user's full name, or null when it is not set.
The user's avatar URL, or null when it is not set.
The user's email address, or null when it is not set.
The number of sites associated with the user, or null when unknown.
The timestamp when the user was created, or null.
The timestamp when the user last logged in, or null.
The login providers connected to the user, or null.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Netlify current user response.

actions.name: get_deploy
actions.description: Retrieve one Netlify deploy by deploy ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Netlify deploy request.

site_id.description: The Netlify site ID for this deploy.

user_id.description: The Netlify user ID that created the deploy.

build_id.description: The Netlify build ID associated with the deploy.

state.description: The deploy state reported by Netlify.

name.description: The site name for this deploy.

url.description: The primary URL for this deploy.

ssl_url.description: The HTTPS URL for this deploy.

admin_url.description: The Netlify admin URL for this deploy.

screenshot_url.description: The screenshot URL for this deploy.

draft.description: Whether this deploy is a draft deploy.

branch.description: The Git branch used for this deploy.

commit_ref.description: The commit reference used for this deploy.

commit_url.description: The commit URL used for this deploy.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was last updated.

published_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was published.

context.description: The deploy context such as production or deploy-preview.

framework.description: The framework detected for this deploy.

error_message.description: The deploy error message when Netlify returns one.

actions.name: get_site
actions.description: Retrieve one Netlify site by site ID or name.

siteId.description: The Netlify site ID or site name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Netlify site request.

state.description: The site state reported by Netlify.

custom_domain.description: The custom domain configured for the site.

domain_aliases.description: The domain aliases configured for the site.

admin_url.description: The Netlify admin URL for the site.

screenshot_url.description: The screenshot URL for the site.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the site was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the site was last updated.

user_id.description: The Netlify user ID that owns the site.

ssl.description: Whether SSL is enabled for the site.

force_ssl.description: Whether HTTP requests are redirected to HTTPS.

managed_dns.description: Whether Netlify manages DNS for the site.

deploy_url.description: The latest unique deploy URL for the site.

site_id.description: The Netlify site ID for this deploy.

user_id.description: The Netlify user ID that created the deploy.

build_id.description: The Netlify build ID associated with the deploy.

state.description: The deploy state reported by Netlify.

name.description: The site name for this deploy.

url.description: The primary URL for this deploy.

ssl_url.description: The HTTPS URL for this deploy.

admin_url.description: The Netlify admin URL for this deploy.

screenshot_url.description: The screenshot URL for this deploy.

draft.description: Whether this deploy is a draft deploy.

branch.description: The Git branch used for this deploy.

commit_ref.description: The commit reference used for this deploy.

commit_url.description: The commit URL used for this deploy.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was last updated.

published_at.description: The timestamp when the deploy was published.

context.description: The deploy context such as production or deploy-preview.

framework.description: The framework detected for this deploy.

error_message.description: The deploy error message when Netlify returns one.

account_id.description: The Netlify account ID that owns the site.

account_name.description: The Netlify account display name that owns the site.

account_slug.description: The Netlify account slug that owns the site.

git_provider.description: The Git provider connected to the site.

deploy_hook.description: The default deploy hook URL for the site.

build_image.description: The build image configured for the site.

functions_region.description: The functions region configured for the site.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Netlify accounts accessible to the connected credential.

type_name.description: The human-readable Netlify account type name.

billing_email.description: The billing email address for the account.

owner_ids.description: The Netlify user IDs that own the account.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the account was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the account was last updated.

accounts.description: The Netlify accounts returned by the request.

count.description: The number of Netlify accounts returned by the request.

actions.name: list_site_forms
actions.description: List forms detected for one Netlify site.

siteId.description: The Netlify site ID or site name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Netlify forms for a site.

site_id.description: The Netlify site ID that owns the form.

paths.description: The paths where the form appears.

submission_count.description: The number of submissions Netlify reports for the form.

fields.description: The form fields returned by Netlify.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the form was created.

forms.description: The Netlify forms returned by the request.

count.description: The number of Netlify forms returned by the request.

actions.name: upload_deploy_file_from_url
actions.description: Upload one file into an existing Netlify deploy by downloading a public file URL first.

path.description: The deploy-relative file path to upload, such as index.html.

fileUrl.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL whose bytes should be uploaded. For local files, upload the file with oo file upload and pass its downloadUrl.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading one file into an existing Netlify deploy from a file URL.

sha.description: The SHA digest Netlify reports for the file.

mime_type.description: The MIME type Netlify reports for the file.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Netlify deploy file response.

actions.name: upload_deploy_function_from_zip_url
actions.description: Upload one Netlify function bundle into an existing deploy by downloading a public zip file URL first.

zipUrl.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL of the zipped function bundle. For local files, upload the file with oo file upload and pass its downloadUrl.

retryCount.description: The Netlify retry count header value to send.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading one Netlify function bundle from a zip file URL.

sha.description: The SHA digest Netlify reports for the function bundle.
